sql_array: CREATE TABLE soap_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, input_xml XML, status VARCHAR(20));
INSERT INTO soap_test (id, input_xml, status) VALUES (1, '<root><child>First Child</child></root>', 'active');
INSERT INTO soap_test (id, input_xml, status) VALUES (2, '<root><child>Second Child</child></root>', 'active');
SELECT soap_make_error(XPath('child', xpath_string(input_xml)), 'Test Error') FROM soap_test WHERE status = 'active';
SELECT soap_make_error('', 'Generic Soap Error') FROM soap_test WHERE input_xml IS NULL;
SELECT soap_make_error(xpath_string('/root/child', input_xml), NULL) FROM soap_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM soap_test WHERE status = 'active');
SELECT soap_make_error(xpath_string('/root/child', input_xml), 'SOAP Error for id: ' || id) FROM soap_test WHERE id > 0;
CREATE TABLE error_log (error_id INT PRIMARY KEY, soap_error VARCHAR(255), timestamp TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO error_log (error_id, soap_error) SELECT id, soap_make_error(xpath_string('/root/child', input_xml), 'Error Archived') FROM soap_test;
WITH xml_data AS (SELECT id, soap_make_error(xpath_string('/root/child', input_xml), 'Node error') AS generated_error FROM soap_test) SELECT * FROM xml_data WHERE generated_error IS NOT NULL;

SELECT MAX(LENGTH(soap_make_error(xpath_string('/root/child', input_xml), 'Long Error message'))), MIN(LENGTH(soap_make_error(xpath_string('/root/child', input_xml), '')) FROM soap_test GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
